calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To May-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he filed a petition for final account with a hearing date of May 1, 2012 asking that the funds be distributed to the County Treasurer. Status on close of the Estate was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Continued To Feb-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon reported that the Public Administrator Investigator (Jennifer Hagerty) from Cook County had contact with George Cook, that they have realized that there are other Family members and that Ms. Hagerty will continue to work with Ms. Lane from the San Francisco Public Administrator's office. Status of close of the Estate was continued to February 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Continued To Nov-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Continued To Sep-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Successor Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon requested a continuance stating that he is in communication with the Decedent's Family in Illinois, that the Family has not filed anything yet because they wanted to know what the final figures are, that he will send them a letter advising them of the assets, what they can estimate to open their Estate in Illinois and what he needs from them in order to close and distribute this Estate. Status of close of the Estate was continued to September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Aug-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that Mr. Cooks was waiting for filing of the tax returns to see what the funds/figures are to open an Estate for Decedent's Mother. The matter was continued to August 9, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Continued To May-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The matter was continued to May 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Ferdon to narrow down the list of instruction to the Family and to see if the Family opens an estate for the Mother and the Sister. Mr. Ferdon will file a petition for instructions or petition to close estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Frnacisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he received no response from Mr. Cook, that the Paralegal and the Tax Accountant were going through the documents and that he would come in with a petition for instructions regarding distribution to the other estate and Mr. Cook's Creditor's Claim sometime in February. The matter was continued to March 1, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Continued To Jan-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA) (Special Administrator).

Mr. Ferdon stated that he has tried to reach Mr. Cooks, that he sent Mr. Cooks a letter, that he hasn't heard back from him and that he responds sometimes, that Mr. Cooks thinks it is about his being the sole heir, that they tried to explain to him that they weren't there yet, and that they tried to talk to him about the need for him to probate his Mother's Estate. Mr. Ferdon also stated that he did realize that the Court waived the accountings, that they can only go by what is in the blocked accounts, that it doesn't resolve the situation that they have in regard to the sale of the two properties, that the Court file is not clear about why those amounts were deposited and not the full proceeds of the sale, and that they certainly understand that there might have been mortgages. In addition, Mr. Ferdon stated that they will go ahead and file a petition for instructions, that they'll go ahead with their tax accountant, that he'll find out what happened years ago when the sale took place, and that they will then report back to the Court. The Court inquired about subpoenaing the escrow records. Mr. Ferdon stated that they don't know who they are. The matter was continued to January 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on close of the Estate.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Continued To Oct-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Successor Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he did not have an accounting from Mr. Cook (Former Administrator). The Court indicated that the Court removed Mr. Cook on Novmeber 17, 2009 and waived an accounting from Mr. Cook. Mr. Ferdon stated that there was a significant difference in the amount of funds in the bank account from what the amount of the proceeds would have been for the sale of the two properties, and that Mr. Cook has not provided them with the escrow statements or tax returns. In addition, Mr. Ferdon stated that he did not know where Ella died and that he would make another attempt to contact Mr. Cook. The Court stated that an estate needs to be opened for Ella, that no funds will go to George and that the funds would go into Ella's estate. Mr. Ferdon will file an inventory from what is in the blocked account. The matter was continued to October 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Continued To Jul-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Continued To Jun-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Jun-18-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he wrote to Mr. Cooks, that he got no response and that he was unable to leave a voice message as the phone mail box was full. The Court will prepare the order removing Mr. Cook's. Mr. Ferdon will prepare the order appointing the Public Administrator as the Successor Administrator. The blocked account will be closed and the Court waived an accounting from Mr. Cooks. The matter was continued to June 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Jun-18-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Ferdon stated that they had received a letter from the Mr. Cooks and that he stated he could not appear because he resides in Illinois. In addition, Mr. Ferdon stated that the money is in a blocked account and requested a two week continuance to review the file. The matter was continued to November 17, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Ferdon stated that he would contact Mr. Cooks

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Continued To Nov-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator for failure to close the estate. The return date is November 4, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
